name: kodim-api
description: Kodim Tech internal Claude Code plugins for core-web-api and core-web-customer

plugins.name: api-dev
plugins.description: Senior Rails Developer for core-web-api. End-to-end flow via /api-dev:ship (Notion → plan → execute TDD → PR → signoff) with 2 human checkpoints. Also provides /api-dev:plan, /api-dev:execute, /api-dev:pr-signoff as standalone skills. Includes annotaterb and doppler hooks.

plugins.name: customer-dev
plugins.description: Senior React + TypeScript Developer for core-web-customer. End-to-end flow via /customer-dev:ship (Notion → plan → execute TDD → review → PR → pr-ready) with 2 human checkpoints. Also provides /customer-dev:plan, /customer-dev:execute, /customer-dev:review (React antipattern scanner), /customer-dev:pr-ready and /customer-dev:address-comments (triage + apply + reply + resolve review threads) as standalone skills. Includes a Rails→React teaching layer and hooks for cross-subscription imports, React smells and push-time CI reminders.

plugins.name: project-manager
plugins.description: Senior Project Manager assistant for the Kathy product (AI agent managing sales and bookings over WhatsApp). Plans, grooms and retrospects on a single Fizzy board for a solo dev with calibrated weekly capacity. 8 skills: bootstrap, weekly-plan, groom (triage included), create-card, status, weekly-review (capacity calibration), roadmap, log-feedback. External memory at ~/.kathy-pm/project-state.md (survives plugin updates). Includes domain heuristics for sales / reservations / customer service. Hands dev work off to /api-dev:plan and /customer-dev:plan via repo:* tags; supports ops cards (type:ops, repo:none) for non-code work. Requires the Fizzy MCP connected.
